1. Today’s Activities
    1. 1. Review the Slides
    2. 2. Watch the Lecture Video(s)

In today’s Lecture, we’ll talk about what it means to program. We’ll also cover many of the logistical/administrative elements of CS 110.

By the end of today you should:

  1. Have an idea of what it means to program
  2. Know why you are taking this class
  3. Have a rough picture of what you will learn in this class
  4. At least be aware of the course resources available to you

Today's Activities

For today, please do the following:

1. Review the Slides

  1. What is programming?

2. Watch the Lecture Video(s)
